'''Captain [[Cavik Toth]]'s personal starfighter''' was a small, one man attack fighter launched from the hangar bay of his [[Sabaoth destroyer|flagship]]. It was armed with heavy [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. It also possessed
phenomenal speed and agility, and a powerful reflective shield to defend it from enemy fire.

During the attack by the [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]] on the [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] refueling site, which was also [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] base before it was
claimed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], Toth escaped, leaving [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] to deal with them. He then flew his starfighter into combat against [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] above [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Toth engaged Gallia's [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighter]] in a deadly duel, continually boasting about his superiority over the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilot. However, Gallia eventually bested Toth, depleting his fighter's reflective shields until the craft suffered critical damage. Toth lost control and Gallia shot him down, moments before his flagship exploded.
